name: workflow-plugin-namecheap
description: Namecheap DNS and domain-transfer provider for workflow IaC
author: GoCodeAlone

required_secrets.name: NAMECHEAP_API_KEY
required_secrets.description: Namecheap API key (rotate via Profile → Tools → Namecheap API Access)

secret_targets.description: Stored as GitHub Actions secrets when workflows run on GitHub.
Stored as GitLab CI/CD variables when workflows run on GitLab; variables may also be narrowed with GitLab's separate environment_scope field.
Stored in Vault for application/runtime retrieval.
Stored in a local file-backed secret store.
Stored in the local OS keychain.
Provided by the local process environment.

required_config.name: NAMECHEAP_API_USER
required_config.description: Namecheap account username (also the ApiUser per Namecheap API)

required_config.name: NAMECHEAP_CLIENT_IP
required_config.description: Non-secret public IP sent as Namecheap ClientIp on every API request; it must already be allowlisted in the Namecheap control panel.
required_config.prompt: Public IP already allowlisted in Namecheap (CIDR not supported)

config_targets.description: Stored as GitHub Actions variables when workflows run on GitHub.
Stored as GitLab CI/CD variables when workflows run on GitLab; variables may also be narrowed with GitLab environment_scope.
Stored in a local dotenv/config file for local workflows.
Provided by the local process environment.
